actions.name: G-Max Gold Rush
actions.description:
Effect: If this Move is used at least once in combat, the user rolls an Ordinary Accounting Skill Check. The user and their allies gain +3 to their Resources Skill, gaining an additional +1 Resource per 4 DoS.

The user may spend up to 6 additional PP, increasing the Power of this attack by 15 per PP spent.

Requirement: User is a Dynamaxed Meowth and has a Normal-Type attack on their Active List.
